content: We can reframe context retrieval-augmentation integration as a demand-paged hierarchical virtual context system, where only the relevant retrieved context segments are dynamically swapped into the LLM's active context window from a large tiered offline knowledge base, just like MemGPT swaps memory between disk and active physical memory. This integration automatically prioritizes high-relevance context segments at the right hierarchical depth, eliminating the need for manual context truncation and reducing redundant retrieval computations.
